results.title: Becky Lynch Praised After WWE Clash In Italy
results.description: Among all the title matches at WWE Clash in Italy, Sol Ruca was the only challenger who emerged victorious. The latest star on the main roster of WWE RAW finally beat Becky Lynch for the WWE Women’s Intercontinental Championship. However, the new champion has plenty of praise for Lynch.
